### 980. 6731942508231696384

- URL: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/outboundphd_entrepreneur-leadership-business-activity-6731942508231696384-h6uC
- Author: 🦾Eric Nowoslawski (@outboundphd)
- Posted: 2020-11-10T14:56:07.406Z

#### Verbatim Content

On Zoom is a quick innovation to allow for events to have pay per view options. For those in the event planning production space, this could be a game changer.

Application will have to be creative. A quick poll on Instagram from myself but also larger pages like the Morning Brew point to many consumers are not willing to pay for a zoom meeting. 

As a marketer, I do take this quick data with a grain of salt. If I got Gary Vaynerchuk to come on to my zoom call and he would be interacting with people, I know hundreds of people that would pay money to be on there. 

My job is to figure out what kinds of guests or events can garner enough interest that people would pay. Something I have been quandering since March. 

Announcement to come soon about how we might be trying to do this.

#entrepreneur #leadership #business #community #sustainability #marketing #success #networking #leadershipdevelopment #opportunity

### 990. 6707658234544562176

- URL: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/outboundphd_leadership-business-networking-activity-6707658234544562176-xkqf
- Author: 🦾Eric Nowoslawski (@outboundphd)
- Posted: 2020-09-04T14:39:05.379Z

#### Verbatim Content

*If you want to skip straight to the part where I skydive, skip to 2 minutes into the video*

As many people know, I have two brothers in the Army. I have seen up close and personal the positive benefits that come with serving in the military. From College tuition payments to paid technical training, the army has a wide array of benefits that many people can utilize. 

Every year, I send hundreds of students to talk with their local Army recruiting station. If they do not have a set plan to go to college and know exactly what they want to do, I tell them they should seriously consider the Army enough to just hear what they have to offer. 

Yesterday, I was selected among 30 other community influencers around NJ to jump with the Premier Golden Knights Parachuting team. They were an exceptional group of people and were great to jump with. We networked with other Community Influencers to reach one common goal, spreading the information about the Army to as many people as possible. 

Thank you again to the U.S. Army for the opportunity yesterday. I’m looking forward to our continued partnership!

 #leadership #business #networking #news #newjersey #community #recruiting #students #team #opportunity #gatewaychamberofcommerce

### 1005. 6687063463115661313

- URL: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/outboundphd_networking-newjersey-positivity-activity-6687063463115661313-Rl1D
- Author: 🦾Eric Nowoslawski (@outboundphd)
- Posted: 2020-07-09T18:42:49.238Z

#### Verbatim Content

The person who says they can and the person that says they can’t are both usually right. 

When I was a gymnastics coach, I always talked to the kids about positive self talk. What you say in your head or even to other people matters. 

What do you say to yourself often and does it keep you motivated. 

I often remember the poem “Invictus” by William Ernest Henley. 
 #Networking #newjersey #positivity  #selftalk  #leadership

This is such a great learning experience for everyone and I would love for you to join me.

We go live on 1 pm today, April 3, and I hope you are able to make it.
 
Any questions?

### 1084. 6606290539253944320

- URL: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/outboundphd_meet-michael-lebovitz-from-romark-logistics-activity-6606290539253944320-0Xjz
- Author: 🦾Eric Nowoslawski (@outboundphd)
- Posted: 2019-11-29T21:20:03.501Z

#### Verbatim Content

Meet Michael Lebovitz from Romark Logistics. Michael was gracious enough to let me take a tour of his warehouse in preparation for our upcoming Gateway Warehouse association meeting on December 4th. 

Romark Logistics’ slogan is “Personalized Service...ALWAYS,” and Michael is for sure the right man for this job. He knew every single employee’s name, their family’s name, and what they are working on personally outside of work. To see this level of acute awareness from top management is not only rare, but it’s also difficult to keep up with. Romark is obviously a leader in the industry because of their care for their workforce, customers, and buildings. Everything is stacked perfectly. Everyone working safely and efficiently. Their warehouse is run like a dream. 

Check out the video to learn more about him and his company. You can also meet him at our meeting next Wednesday. Just ask for more details. I’ll see you there.

### 1088. 6607671155170045952

- URL: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/outboundphd_newjersey-networking-gatewaychamberofcommerce-activity-6607671155170045952-VWaC
- Author: 🦾Eric Nowoslawski (@outboundphd)
- Posted: 2019-12-03T16:46:07.986Z

#### Verbatim Content

The first thing we need to realize about influencing and persuading. Humans are not rational. We operate on feelings and then justify with logic. 

In a study, a liquor store played French music or German music in particular days. French wine sales increased with the French music. German beer sales increased with the German music. When people were asked how they made their purchases they responded with perfectly rational comments such as “A friend recommended it to me” or “I wanted to try a new premium beer.” 

Be aware that people operate because of their feelings like an Elephant and a Rider. The Elephant is much bigger than the Rider and makes most of the decisions. 

 #newjersey #networking #gatewaychamberofcommerce #salesgrowth

### 1103. 6601200453743112192

- URL: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/outboundphd_to-give-this-article-perspective-during-activity-6601200453743112192-yf77
- Author: 🦾Eric Nowoslawski (@outboundphd)
- Posted: 2019-11-15T20:13:52.546Z

#### Verbatim Content

To give this article perspective, during the 2016 primary, Google search for Hilary Clinton would follow with suggestions for Hilary Clinton "book" "age" "net worth." Bing, who's algorithm is much closer to overall search queries, would suggest Hilary Clinton "net worth" "emails" "scandal." 

I just checked, even today nothing about the Hilary Clinton email scandal is suggested on Google but it is still suggested on bing. All of my claims here can be backed up by using Google Trends to compare the search queries.

### 1119. 6581978499156885504

- URL: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/outboundphd_visionary-marketing-gatewaychamberofcommerce-activity-6581978499156885504-RkLL
- Author: 🦾Eric Nowoslawski (@outboundphd)
- Posted: 2019-09-23T19:12:41.446Z

#### Verbatim Content

In this video, I had the opportunity to sit down with Ms. Wanda Toro Turini to discuss what is happening at her company, EcoFiles. I intended to keep this video short, however, after seeing Wanda’s enthusiasm talking about her business, I let her have some fun and found out along the way that we are both SCUBA divers! I encourage everyone to enjoy the discussion we had but since it is 7 minutes long, I wanted to sum it up for anyone that was interested.
 
Wanda is so exciting to talk to because of her “see a need, fill a need” mentality. When she witnessed a mountain of brochures that were being thrown away after a conference, she knew there had to be a better way to help companies reach their target customers. Her business is centered around getting content to the correct market and watching how the market responds to the content. On top of everything else, she runs a green company! Long before companies were investing in eco friendly content, Wanda was predicting the future and creating products that would fulfill the future companies needs. #visionary #marketing #gatewaychamberofcommerce #networking #newjersey #womeninbusiness #womenownedbusiness @ecofilesmobile

### 1148. 6468203147469873152

- URL: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/outboundphd_debunking-8-myths-about-ai-in-the-workplace-activity-6468203147469873152-6KSg
- Author: 🦾Eric Nowoslawski (@outboundphd)
- Posted: 2018-11-13T20:10:03.760Z

#### Verbatim Content

I hear of many people being afraid of Artificial Intelligence (AI). However, I see it as a tool for Humans to become more productive by many orders of magnitude. Check out this article Debunking some of the fears of AI.
